headline: How Chevron’s Legal Leadership Shift And Shareholder Votes At Chevron (CVX) Have Changed Its Investment Story
summary: In late May 2026, Chevron announced that long-serving Chief Legal Officer R. Hewitt Pate will resign at the end of 2026 ahead of his planned mid-2027 retirement, with appellate specialist Scott A. Keller joining as general counsel on July 1, 2026 to assume the chief legal officer role from January 1, 2027. At the same time, shareholders rejected several governance and human-rights-related proposals while re-electing all director nominees, signaling continued support for Chevron’s existing...
